event.name: Celebrating Independence: White Cane Day Walk

description: Photo, icon, and video assets for the Envision Dallas White Cane Day Walk, plus a post-visit thank-you email template. Every photo was individually reviewed; descriptions and tags below are written for keyword search and AI-assisted retrieval.
usage_notes: Event and brand photos can be renamed or moved freely; nothing references them by name.
The 7 image files in email/ MUST keep their exact filenames — VisitUs-EMAIL.html references them by name.
Photos contain identifiable event attendees; use per Envision Dallas photo-consent and privacy practices.

categories.event-photos/the-walk: Participants walking/marching with white canes, and the start banner.
categories.event-photos/ceremony-and-program: Seated audience and the outdoor program.
categories.event-photos/animal-encounters: Dallas Zoo animal encounters: giraffe, tortoise, opossum.
categories.event-photos/registration-and-booths: Check-in and the Envision info/braille booth.
categories.email: Thank-you email template and its referenced image assets.

assets.description: A smiling woman holding a white cane walks a tree-lined zoo path beside a younger attendee in a 'Rollin' to the Beat / Bowl-A-Thon' T-shirt.
A cane user in an Envision Dallas polo is sighted-guided arm-in-arm by a companion while another woman films on her phone.
A blind woman with a white cane (navy skirt, clip-on fan) walks and chats with a younger woman companion.
A stream of participants in lanyards and event shirts walking the zoo's wooden boardwalk.
A dense crowd, many raising white canes, marching behind the large green 'INDEPENDENCE' banner; a 'White Cane Day' T-shirt in front.
Wide marquee shot: the whole group behind the 'Celebrating Independence — White Cane Day Walk — Dallas Zoo' start banner with sponsor logos (Southwest, Comerica, Atmos, ABC).
A woman in a black-and-white floral top raises a folded white cane amid the seated crowd; a 'U.S. Navy Veteran' cap nearby.
Wide shot of the seated audience in teal event shirts watching the program; wheelchair users in front, a Pepsi machine and PA speaker at right.
Attendees at the Dallas Zoo giraffe deck hold out lettuce to feed a giraffe leaning over the wooden enclosure.
Two Dallas Zoo keepers in purple polos present a tortoise beside the 'White Cane Day Walk — Animal Encounter Sponsor' banner.
A Dallas Zoo keeper with a microphone presents an opossum to the seated audience near the thatched huts.
The Envision Dallas info booth under a pavilion — staff demonstrate Perkins braille typewriters at a banner-draped table; visitors and children gather.
Indoor check-in in a lodge room with elephant-silhouette decor — a man in a white polo hands out materials at a black-draped table.
Posed group of four by the boardwalk railing — a U.S. Navy veteran in a cap and three participants in Envision walk shirts.
Seven smiling Delta Gamma sorority volunteers pose together on the zoo path.
A family with children poses under the colorful LED-lit tunnel ceiling; White Cane Day shirts and a folded cane.
A large multi-generational group (with a stroller) poses under the LED tunnel's blue/green light strips.
A group of attendees poses in the mural tunnel, including cane users and a child in a stroller.
A smiling, balding man in a dark polo and lanyard waves at the camera during the event.
Two women share a warm hug in front of a Pepsi/Dole Whip concession stand; a baby in a stroller at left.
A volunteer bends down to hand a treat to a delighted young boy in blue near a shaded path.
Close-up of a hand gripping a white cane with a small sneaker keychain tied to the grip; crowd blurred behind.
Clean exterior photo of the Envision Dallas building (brown brick, blue/green logo signage) under a blue sky.
Animated hero/background video: the 'Celebrating Independence — White Cane Day Walk — Dallas Zoo' logo animating in (white-cane motif, blue/green type).
Responsive post-visit thank-you email for Envision Dallas. Image src's use a placeholder host (REPLACE-WITH-YOUR-IMAGE-URL/); host the 7 email images and swap that base URL before sending.
Email hero/banner: the Envision Dallas building with a navy overlay.
Circular blue/green 'Share' icon (share-node glyph).
Circular blue/green 'Kroger Community Rewards' icon (shopping cart).
Circular blue/green 'Make a donation' icon (heart).
Facebook app-style icon.
Instagram app-style icon.
LinkedIn app-style icon.
